mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report ( reporter_id, room_id, target_member_id, report_type, reason, status ) VALUES ( #{reporterId}, NULL, #{targetMemberId}, 'MEMBER', #{reason}, 'PENDING' )
INSERT INTO report ( reporter_id, room_id, target_member_id, report_type, reason, status ) VALUES ( #{reporterId}, #{roomId}, #{targetMemberId}, 'ROOM', #{reason}, 'PENDING' )

INSERT INTO report ( reporter_id, room_id, chat_room_id, target_member_id, report_type, reason, status ) VALUES ( #{reporterId}, #{roomId}, #{chatRoomId}, #{targetMemberId}, 'CHAT', #{reason}, 'PENDING' )

INSERT INTO report ( reporter_id, community_post_id, target_member_id, report_type, reason, status ) VALUES ( #{reporterId}, #{communityPostId}, #{targetMemberId}, 'COMMUNITY_POST', #{reason}, 'PENDING' )

INSERT INTO report ( reporter_id, community_post_id, community_comment_id, target_member_id, report_type, reason, status ) VALUES ( #{reporterId}, #{communityPostId}, #{communityCommentId}, #{targetMemberId}, 'COMMUNITY_COMMENT', #{reason}, 'PENDING' )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT r.target_member_id FROM report r INNER JOIN members target ON target.member_id = r.target_member_id WHERE r.target_member_id IS NOT NULL AND target.deleted = 0 AND target.status != 'DELETED' AND target.role = 'USER' AND (r.status = 'PENDING' OR r.resolution_type = 'ACCEPTED') GROUP BY r.target_member_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{threshold} ) candidates

SELECT target.member_id AS memberId, target.email AS email, target.name AS name, target.status AS status, target.ban_count AS banCount, COUNT(*) AS totalReports, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingReports, SUM(CASE WHEN r.resolution_type = 'ACCEPTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS acceptedReports, MAX(r.report_created_at) AS lastReportedAt FROM report r INNER JOIN members target ON target.member_id = r.target_member_id WHERE r.target_member_id IS NOT NULL AND target.deleted = 0 AND target.status != 'DELETED' AND target.role = 'USER' AND (r.status = 'PENDING' OR r.resolution_type = 'ACCEPTED') GROUP BY target.member_id, target.email, target.name, target.status, target.ban_count HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{threshold} ORDER BY pendingReports DESC, totalReports DESC, lastReportedAt DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT trend_date AS trendDate, SUM(created_reports) AS createdReports, SUM(resolved_reports) AS resolvedReports FROM ( SELECT DATE(report_created_at) AS trend_date, COUNT(*) AS created_reports, 0 AS resolved_reports FROM report WHERE report_created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL (#{days} - 1) DAY) GROUP BY DATE(report_created_at) UNION ALL SELECT DATE(processed_at) AS trend_date, 0 AS created_reports, COUNT(*) AS resolved_reports FROM report WHERE processed_at IS NOT NULL AND processed_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL (#{days} - 1) DAY) GROUP BY DATE(processed_at) ) daily GROUP BY trend_date ORDER BY trend_date ASC

SELECT r.report_id AS reportId, r.room_id AS roomId, r.chat_room_id AS chatRoomId, r.community_post_id AS communityPostId, r.community_comment_id AS communityCommentId, r.target_member_id AS targetMemberId, target.email AS targetMemberEmail, target.name AS targetMemberName, r.reporter_id AS reporterId, reporter.email AS reporterEmail, reporter.name AS reporterName, r.report_type AS reportType, r.reason AS reason, r.status AS status, r.resolution_type AS resolutionType, r.resolution_message AS resolutionMessage, r.processed_by AS processedBy, processor.email AS processedByEmail, processor.name AS processedByName, r.processed_at AS processedAt, r.report_created_at AS reportCreatedAt FROM report r INNER JOIN members target ON target.member_id = r.target_member_id INNER JOIN members reporter ON reporter.member_id = r.reporter_id LEFT JOIN members processor ON processor.member_id = r.processed_by WHERE r.report_id = #{reportId}
mapper.update: UPDATE report SET status = #{status}, resolution_type = #{resolutionType}, resolution_message = #{resolutionMessage}, processed_by = #{processedBy}, processed_at = NOW() WHERE report_id = #{reportId} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT r.report_id AS reportId, r.target_member_id AS targetMemberId, target.email AS targetMemberEmail, target.name AS targetMemberName, r.room_id AS roomId, r.chat_room_id AS chatRoomId, r.community_post_id AS communityPostId, r.community_comment_id AS communityCommentId, r.report_type AS reportType, r.reason AS reason, r.status AS status, r.resolution_type AS resolutionType, r.resolution_message AS resolutionMessage, r.processed_at AS processedAt, r.report_created_at AS reportCreatedAt FROM report r INNER JOIN members target ON target.member_id = r.target_member_id WHERE r.reporter_id = #{reporterId} AND r.report_id = #{reportId}

SELECT r.report_id AS reportId, r.target_member_id AS targetMemberId, target.email AS targetMemberEmail, target.name AS targetMemberName, r.room_id AS roomId, r.chat_room_id AS chatRoomId, r.community_post_id AS communityPostId, r.community_comment_id AS communityCommentId, r.report_type AS reportType, r.reason AS reason, r.status AS status, r.resolution_type AS resolutionType, r.resolution_message AS resolutionMessage, r.processed_at AS processedAt, r.report_created_at AS reportCreatedAt FROM report r INNER JOIN members target ON target.member_id = r.target_member_id WHERE r.reporter_id = #{reporterId} ORDER BY r.report_created_at DESC, r.report_id DESC
